project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO; iOS: SwiftUI, GRDB, EPUBKit, PDFKit, NaturalLanguage, Accelerate, marmeleiro/Zip

completed: Phase 1–4: All previously complete (P1.1–P1.6, P2, P2.5, iOS live testing phases 1–4)
Phase 6 DONE — WorkflowRunner + 5 templates + full UI
Session 2026-03-25: Bug fixes and feature additions from user testing feedback
Session 2026-03-29 (Part 1): Per-KB retrieval settings + doc status indicators + local notifications + XCUITest suite
Session 2026-03-29 (Part 2): Enterprise RAG pipeline overhaul (tag: large_update)
— Hybrid RRF retrieval, sentence chunking, per-KB settings, document metadata, enterprise system prompt
Session 2026-03-30: Real-device workflow testing + documentation update (tag: working_well)
— Fixed DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in all 4 test target build configs (UITests + Tests, Debug + Release)
— Rewrote tests 12–16 as live workflow execution tests (run existing workflows, poll Done/Failed)
— Tests 12–16 all pass on Captain Jack Sparrow (iOS 26.4, 00008103-0005583101BB001E)
— Diagnosed root cause: workflows retrieve 0 chunks because assigned KB has no imported docs
— Updated SPECIFICATION.md to reflect full production-ready state
next_steps: Fix 0-chunk workflow root cause (user action required):
— Open Workflows tab → tap Edit on each workflow → verify the KB picker shows a KB with documents
— If KB is empty: import EPUBs from /Users/Dans_iMac/Desktop/BACKUP_source_epubs/agatha_christie/
— Re-run a workflow after import to confirm chunks are retrieved
— Import 5 Christie EPUBs, ask 'List all documents in this knowledge base with authors and length'
— Verify chapter titles in Passage Viewer match actual EPUB TOC (not Section N)
— Verify fileType/pageCount/wordCount/passages shown in document rows
— Q&A chunk method: extract question-answer pairs from FAQ documents
— Reranking: cross-encoder scoring (requires Ollama model with reranking support)
— Knowledge graph / entity extraction for GraphRAG-style querying
— Web crawl ingestion (WKWebView or URLSession HTML fetch + strip)
— Set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode Signing for TestFlight / App Store submission
— Test BGContinuedProcessingTask on real iOS 26 device (not simulatable)
— Investigate Deep Summarizer 'Failed' root cause via step log

known_gaps.code_signing: DEVELOPMENT_TEAM = LVK5C2V4J8 now set in all targets — TestFlight needs Archive + Distribute
known_gaps.workflow_zero_chunks: Workflows retrieve 0 chunks if assigned KB has no docs or kbId is stale — user must verify KB assignment and import documents
known_gaps.workflow_failed: Deep Summarizer shown as 'Failed' — root cause uninvestigated; check step log
known_gaps.workflow_categorize: Categorize/Switch step types not implemented — requires branching design
known_gaps.bg_task_simulator: BGContinuedProcessingTask cannot be triggered in Simulator — real device required
known_gaps.streaming_background: LLM streaming cannot use background URLSession — 30s UIKit fence is best achievable
known_gaps.chunk_method_qa_paper_table: ChunkMethod enum exists with UI but only General is wired in ingest; Q&A/Paper/Table behave same as General
known_gaps.reranking: No cross-encoder reranking — topN candidates returned as-is after RRF
known_gaps.knowledge_graph: GraphRAG/entity extraction not implemented on iOS

last_commit.message: Test(iOS): workflow execution tests on real device + test target signing fix

architecture_notes.retrieval_pipeline: RAGService.retrieve(query:kb:) — hybrid RRF fusing BM25 (FTS5) + cosine (Ollama embeddings via currentQueryEmbedding transient). Normalised score filtered by kb.similarityThreshold, top kb.topK returned. Fallback to pure BM25 when no embeddings.
architecture_notes.chunker: NLTokenizer(unit:.sentence) sentence boundaries → word-grouped windows. Sentences exceeding chunkSize split at word boundaries. Configurable chunkSize/chunkOverlap per KB.
architecture_notes.system_prompt: buildEnterprisePrompt() in LLMService.swift. Shared across Claude/OpenAI/Ollama. Includes full KB catalog (fileType/pages/words/passages) + retrieved passages numbered. Claude gets extra brave_search/jina_reader tool instructions.
architecture_notes.db_migrations: v1 books+chunks+FTS5 | v2 embeddings | v3 knowledge_bases+kbId | v4 messages+message_sources | v5 workflows | v6 chat_sessions+sessionId | v7 topK | v8 topN/chunkMethod/chunkSize/chunkOverlap/similarityThreshold + fileType/pageCount/wordCount/sourceURL + documentTitle
architecture_notes.workflow_runner: WorkflowRunner.run(workflow:input:) — async step executor. Step types: begin, retrieve, rewrite, message, webSearch, llm, answer. Streams final LLM step to UI. BackgroundTaskCoordinator tracks step count for BGTask time management.
architecture_notes.test_target_signing: All 4 targets (main app Debug/Release + UITests Debug/Release + Tests Debug/Release) have DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=LVK5C2V4J8 and CODE_SIGN_STYLE=Automatic. Required for on-device deployment.
